title: ClearVisionGlass 32x - Faithful Addon
description: This Faithful resourcepack addon that makes regular glass, all types of colored glass, and even the tinted glass clear!
body:
This [Faithful](https://www.faithfulpack.net/) addon makes regular glass, all types of colored glass,
and even the tinted glass - clear, allowing the players to enjoy the view through their glass windows without annoying glare pixels that get in the way of sight🌻

This resourcepack works great with shaders and affects both glass blocks and panes.

Compatible from Minecraft 1.13 to Minecraft 26.1.2

**Required:** [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) **OR** [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) **OR** [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads)
(For the connected glass textures to work.)
Optional: [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x)

![Transparent Glass in a terralith lavender valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeb027ba0d71c5c8903f92488f4f5af347746d69.jpeg)
![Transparent Glass closer up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a0e4df2617d4fb55984cc6044a63cfac90877c7.jpeg)
![Multiple colors of glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8d78f1a037607413ba6fba483deb7fcecf697a9.jpeg)
